subject: TSL Daily Digest — Mar 12, 2026
html:
TSL Internal

TSL Daily Digest

Thursday, March 12, 2026  ·  For Sam & David

Key moves today

  • New home page shipped — rolls up multiple signals across the platform. Big lift, marks a real product milestone.
  • Charlotte sync (Mar 11): Got the full Vantager post-mortem. MSCI acquisition closed; Charlotte received $7K and is frustrated. Her breakdown of what made Vantager best-in-class is direct roadmap input: full auditability to source docs, data room API ingestion, end-deliverable memos (not intermediate outputs), and seamless GP permissioning.
  • TSL Launch Party tonight in SF — David confirmed attending.

Priorities for tomorrow

  1. gtmSF dinner event — 13 confirmed, $2K total ($750 prepaid). Fun-fact poker cards, LP-themed menu. Note: Alex (Jordan Park) has shellfish allergy.
  2. productPitch deck upload demo — committed to Charlotte within one week (deadline ~Mar 18). DocSend extraction is the key blocker.
  3. product(David) Fun fact cards for tonight's attendees — needs to be done before dinner.

Watch list

  • Charlotte platform onboarding: goal was today — confirm she has login access before the week closes.

Open tasks

  • [David] Inbound follow-ups — carrying forward
  • [David] Fun fact cards for SF event — from DZ Weekly, Mar 9
  • [David] Finalize menu (LP/side letter naming) — from DZ Weekly, Mar 9
  • [Sam] Pitch deck upload demo (1-week deadline from Mar 11) — from Charlotte sync
  • [Sam] Explore DocSend extraction — from Charlotte sync, Mar 11
  • [Sam] Introduce Charlotte to Ben & Will — from Charlotte sync, Mar 11
  • [Sam] Burgiss data follow-up with Charlotte — from Charlotte sync, Mar 11
  • [Sam] Email Cameron re: fund investment — from DZ Weekly, Mar 9

Source: Charlotte / Sam Sync (Mar 11), Sam Update #TSLinternal (Mar 11), TSL/Allocator Ideas Brief (Mar 9), Sam / DZ Weekly Catch Up (Mar 9)
